topics.title: Sal’s Racist Comments and Apology
topics.summary: The studio reacts to a colleague's racially insensitive remarks regarding a public figure's child and the subsequent scripted apology required by human resources.

topics.title: Radio Personality Apology and Studio Commentary
topics.summary: The studio records a series of failed apology attempts by a colleague for offensive remarks while the hosts mock the situation and discuss their personal lives.

topics.title: Sal Gaburnelli's Controversial Remarks and Apology
topics.summary: The studio records the fallout of Sal Gaburnelli’s racially charged comments on air, including his panicked reaction to a human resources intervention and his subsequent recorded apologies.

topics.title: Sal Governale's Mock Apology
topics.summary: The studio mocks a pre-recorded apology from Sal Governale regarding his previous remarks and discusses the logistics of an upcoming roast.

topics.title: Sal Governale Pranked Over Racist Comments
topics.summary: The studio records a prank on Sal Governale involving his repeated and increasingly absurd attempts to apologize for making offensive remarks about race and alcohol.

topics.title: American Idol and Celebrity Gossip
topics.summary: The studio discusses contestants on American Idol, celebrity appearances in the audience, and a production dispute regarding a Tool track for the Private Parts soundtrack.

topics.title: Interview with Adult Film Actress Paris Gables
topics.summary: The studio hosts a conversation with adult film actress Paris Gables regarding her career in extreme pornography, her experiences on set, and her personal habits.

topics.title: Vomit Fetish Performance
topics.summary: The studio features a guest with a vomiting fetish who performs the act in front of the audience while being filmed.

topics.title: Host Poll on Vomiting Segments
topics.summary: The studio conducts a listener poll to determine if the show should continue featuring segments involving vomiting.

topics.title: Host Confrontation Over Talent Pay
topics.summary: The studio records a heated exchange regarding the compensation and perceived value of a guest's performance on the radio.

topics.title: Contract Dispute and Rob Zombie Interview
topics.summary: The studio hosts a heated negotiation over payment and contract terms with Riley Martin before transitioning to an interview with Rob Zombie regarding his film career.

topics.title: Rob Zombie's Career and Musical Influences
topics.summary: The studio features a discussion with Rob Zombie regarding his new album, his history of performing with other artists, and his personal views on the music industry.

topics.title: Rob Zombie Interview and Guest Commentary
topics.summary: The show features an interview with Rob Zombie regarding his new album and personal life, followed by listener calls discussing the influence of his music and commentary on other media personalities.

topics.title: Oprah Winfrey Appearance and Media Coverage
topics.summary: The studio discusses a recent television special featuring Oprah Winfrey, specifically critiquing the jarring contrast between her appearance with and without heavy makeup.

topics.title: Hollywood Celebrity Salaries and News
topics.summary: The studio discusses Hollywood power rankings, celebrity salary estimates for actors like Brad Pitt and Steve Martin, and news regarding Brad Pitt's personal life in Africa.

topics.title: Media News and Entertainment Updates
topics.summary: The studio covers a variety of topics including celebrity rumors, an apology for offensive remarks, ABC news staffing changes, updates on the 9/11 investigation, political commentary regarding Hillary Clinton and Al Gore, and upcoming television finales for American Idol and Lost.
